channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Chemical tank implosion in Washington state kills 1 and leaves 9 missing
item.description: Authorities have confirmed that one person died and 9 others remain unaccounted for after a chemical tank imploded at a pulp and paper mill in Washington state.

item.title: ICE detainees are dying by suicide at an ‘alarming’ rate, an AP investigation finds
Takeaways from AP investigation that found ‘alarming’ spike in suicide deaths of ICE detainees
